name: Teto [BIRDBRAIN]  🐓
description:
“I keep on running like a chicken with its head cut off!”

══════════════════

🐓 Everyone’s favorite birdbrain and girl-failure, realized fully for all of your chatting pleasures!

Tried to assume her personality from the song to the best of my abilities, I am quite meticulous with these things so If there are any glaring issues notifying me would be much appreciated!

You may notice a few consistent quirks and bits of background info I wrote in, I tried to make everything on theme but if anything feels too on the nose of out of place feel free to tell me and I’ll consider editing it!!!

Also in case it wasn’t apparent, this rendition of Teto is trans!!! 🏳️‍⚧️

(So yes, if you were to do anything freaky then she would have a penits as foretold in the song, so if anybody has issues with that then this bot is not for you!!!)
